approval_requirements.reason: Estimated cost exceeds the high-amount review threshold.

failure_reasons.message: Fare comparison evidence was not attached to the proposal packet.

preferred_alternatives.summary: Attach the compared nonstop and one-stop quotes to the proposal packet.
preferred_alternatives.rationale: The selected fare can stay if comparable evidence is documented.

exception_guidance: If the traveler cannot use the approved provider, document the route risk and request an exception.
notes: Evaluation reused the planner snapshot version triplet from submission time.
